hero.label: Law Office
hero.title: Legal Excellence, Concrete Results
hero.description: Superior legal representation, grounded in extensive experience, professional rigour and absolute dedication to the client's interests.

expertise.label: Practice Areas
expertise.title: Comprehensive Legal Expertise
expertise.description: Specialised legal assistance in multiple branches of law, with proven results and deep experience in every practice area.
expertise.civilDesc: Complex civil litigation, commercial contracts, debt recovery and representation before superior courts.
expertise.commercialDesc: Corporate advisory, mergers & acquisitions, corporate restructuring and regulatory compliance.
expertise.familyDesc: Divorce proceedings, custody, matrimonial division and protection of minors' interests.
expertise.realestateDesc: Real estate transactions, compliance reviews, property litigation and development advisory.
expertise.laborDesc: Individual and collective labour disputes, contract negotiations and employment relations advisory.
expertise.criminalDesc: Strategic criminal defence, assistance during investigation and trial representation.

results.label: Proven Results
results.title: Excellence in Performance
results.description: Consistent performance and measurable results in representing clients' interests.

about.label: About the Office
about.title: Experience, Integrity, Results
about.p1: With over 35 years of active legal practice, I have developed comprehensive expertise in multiple areas of law, successfully representing clients' interests in hundreds of complex cases.
about.p2: The office's philosophy is built on three fundamental pillars: rigorous preparation, a legal strategy tailored to each case, and transparent communication with the client throughout the representation.
about.p3: My approach combines deep knowledge of legislation with practical experience accumulated in courts at all levels, ensuring legal representation of the highest quality.
about.cred2: Certified in Mediation and Alternative Dispute Resolution
about.cred4: Member of the International Bar Association

testimonials.label: Client Feedback
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Clients' trust and satisfaction are the most valuable indicator of the quality of our services.

approach.label: Methodology
approach.title: Our Approach
approach.description: A structured and methodical process ensuring optimal legal representation.
approach.step1Desc: Detailed assessment of the legal situation, identification of all relevant aspects and development of a personalised strategy tailored to each case.
approach.step2Desc: Formulating a strategic approach based on relevant case law, risk analysis and the client's objectives, ensuring the most efficient path to the desired outcome.
approach.step3Desc: Executing the strategy with attention to detail, compliance with procedural deadlines and maintaining professional standards at the highest level throughout the process.
approach.step4Desc: Constant updates on the case's progress, clear explanations of legal procedures and availability for clarifications and consultations throughout the engagement.

articleCards.description: Professional perspectives on recent legislative and jurisprudential developments.
